title: BEM-853 route smoke
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 08:34 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem852_execute_functional_smoke_chain.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
status_in=prev.get('status')
created_files=[]
if status_in=='functional_smoke_pass':
    status='route_process_real_response'
    next_action='process real Claude response into agreed protocol'
elif status_in=='functional_smoke_missing_real_response_only':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem853_claude_real_response_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-853 retry real Claude response; dispatch and runtime proofs already exist','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='queued_real_response_retry'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
elif status_in=='functional_smoke_missing_runtime_state':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem853_claude_runtime_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-853 retry Claude runtime state proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='queued_runtime_retry'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state and response'
else:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem853_dispatch_result_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-853 retry dispatch result proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='queued_dispatch_result_retry'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify dispatch results'
state={'bem':'BEM-853','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem853_route_after_functional_smoke.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem853_route_after_functional_smoke.md').write_text('# BEM-853 | Route After Functional Smoke | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem853_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. commit_sha null ignored.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-853'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem853_route_after_functional_smoke.json','governance/reports/bem853_route_after_functional_smoke.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem853_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-852 functional smoke and queued the next retry only for the missing proof')
"""
No issue comments.
